section.title: Jewellery services, handled with care.
section.subtitle: Explore ready collections, custom orders, styling appointments, repairs, and bridal jewellery planning with a dedicated advisor.

categories.title: Gold Jewellery
categories.summary: Hallmarked everyday and occasion pieces in yellow, rose, and antique gold finishes.

categories.title: Diamond Jewellery
categories.summary: Certified diamond rings, bracelets, pendants, and statement pieces with clean contemporary settings.

categories.title: Gemstone Pieces
categories.summary: Emerald, ruby, sapphire, pearl, and kundan accents selected for tone, clarity, and character.

categories.title: Custom Design
categories.summary: Personalised jewellery designed around your story, budget, stone preference, and wearing style.

categories.title: Gifting
categories.summary: Elegant gifts for birthdays, anniversaries, festivals, baby showers, and milestone moments.

categories.title: Care & Repair
categories.summary: Cleaning, polishing, resizing, clasp checks, stone tightening, and restoration guidance.

bridal.title: Wedding jewellery, planned like a trousseau.
bridal.subtitle: From engagement rings to wedding-day sets and family gifts, each bridal consultation balances outfit, ceremony, budget, and heirloom value.

packages.name: Engagement Edit
packages.description: Rings, bracelets, pendants, and lightweight sets for engagement and pre-wedding functions.

packages.name: Bridal Heirloom Set
packages.description: Our signature bridal planning appointment for necklace, earrings, bangles, and matching details.

packages.name: Wedding Family Suite
packages.description: A coordinated jewellery plan for bride, close family, gifting, and ceremony essentials.
